summary: Backend (8/8 pytest) PASS for cohort-merge admin endpoint, source-filter status combinations, session-price shape, create-session-order-with-slot, credit-booking regression. Frontend mentor unblur works (no .blur-sm elements on mentor cards for free_trial). CRITICAL bug: free-trial 'Book Now' still detours to old 'Coaching Access Required' modal instead of opening the slot picker directly — violates the P0 spec for direct-pay flow. Admin source-filter & cohort badges could not be UI-verified (mock-admin click never landed on /admin?section=discovery-calls; locator timed out).

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking [data-testid^='mentor-card-...'] 'Book Now' on a free-trial user (0 credits, no coaching plan) opens the legacy 'Coaching Access Required' modal (Book Single Session / View Coaching Plans) instead of the slot-picker dialog with the new payment-method radios (pay-with-credit-radio / pay-direct-radio). Spec explicitly says this detour must be removed for both credit and non-credit users.
ui_bugs.selector: button:has-text('Book Now') on mentor card → expected slot picker; got 'Coaching Access Required' dialog

ui_bugs.issue: UI verification of [data-testid='discovery-source-filter'] and [data-testid^='cohort-badge-'] timed out — could not confirm rendering end-to-end. Component code DOES have the testids and source filter, but admin-section did not render in the headless run (mock-admin login flow may need explicit redirect). Backend merge response is correct (verified via pytest — cohort entries returned with source=cohort, cohort_name, etc.) so risk is UI-only.

integration_issues.issue: Free-trial user cannot reach the new payment radios because Book Now still hits the old gate modal. Need to remove the conditional that routes free-trial / no-credit users to the purchase-session modal in handleMentorClick / handleBookSession (CoachingPage.jsx ~line 700/1195).

action_items: FIX (P0): In CoachingPage.jsx, remove the 'Coaching Access Required' / 'Unlock Coaching Sessions' detour for users without credits. handleMentorClick / Book Now should ALWAYS open the slot-picker dialog. The pay-direct radio should appear regardless of credit balance, and the pay-with-credit radio should only appear when credits > 0 or unlimited.

VERIFY: Re-run the frontend Playwright flow once the gate is removed to confirm pay-direct-radio + pay-with-credit-radio render and that the confirm button switches to 'Pay ₹X & Book' when pay-direct is selected.

VERIFY (admin): Manually visit /admin?section=discovery-calls as admin to confirm purple 'Cohort · {name}' badges show under cohort names and the Source dropdown filters correctly (backend response is already correct per pytest).
critical_code_review_comments: CoachingPage.jsx still contains the legacy 'purchase session / unlock coaching' modal trigger that intercepts the Book Now click for free-trial users — must be removed per spec point #5.
DiscoveryCallsSection.jsx merge logic and testids are correctly added; backend is in good shape.
Backend admin merge endpoint correctly maps cohort statuses (scheduled→accepted, cancelled→rejected) and exposes source/cohort_name/cohort_slug as required.

success_rate.frontend: 33% (1 of 3 P0 features verified — unblur OK; direct-pay BROKEN; admin badge UNVERIFIED)

test_credentials: Used POST /api/auth/mock-login?user_type=admin / subscription / free_trial. Same credentials as iteration_65.
seed_data_creation: None. Reused existing 14 cohort_discovery_calls in dev DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend admin discovery-calls merge endpoint is solid (8/8 pytest). The remaining P0 work is purely frontend: CoachingPage.jsx must remove the legacy 'Coaching Access Required' gate so Book Now opens the slot picker for everyone, and the pay-direct-radio + pay-with-credit-radio must render after a slot is picked. Once fixed, re-run a Playwright flow that: logs in as free_trial → /dashboard/coaching → clicks first mentor's Book Now → asserts dialog opens → picks a date+slot+session-type → asserts both radios visible → selects pay-direct → asserts confirm button text contains 'Pay ₹'. Also a separate admin run that asserts data-testid='discovery-source-filter' is visible and at least one [data-testid^='cohort-badge-'] is rendered.
rca of the issue: Free-trial Book Now flow: spec required removing the old 'purchase session / unlock' detour modal so all candidates land on the slot picker and choose between credit vs direct-pay. The detour is still in CoachingPage.jsx — likely a leftover conditional in handleMentorClick or the mentor-card onClick that gates by has_coaching_plan / credits > 0. Need to delete that branch and always open the slot-picker.
